section.heading: Unfilled vacancies

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: In the event of an unfilled vacancy for any critical position at the United States Merchant Marine Academy, the Secretary of Transportation may appoint, without regard to the provisions of subchapter I of chapter 33 of title 5, other than sections 3303 and 3328 of that title, a qualified candidate for the purposes of filling up to 20 of such positions.

subsection.heading: Critical Position Defined.—
subsection.chapeau: In this section, the term “critical position” means a position that contributes to the improvement of—

paragraph.content: the culture or infrastructure of the Academy;
any other priority areas identified by the Council.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–81, div. C, title XXXV, § 3501(c)(1), Dec. 27, 2021, 135 Stat. 2238.)
